title: PCR and Gel electrophoresis/purification protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"efve5","text":"This protocol describes Polymerase chain reaction PCR, Gel electrophoresis and Gel purification.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Wash cells (from a 96-well plate) with 100 µL PBS & aspirate
Add 30 µL QuickExtract™ and scrape well bottom with pipette tip to detach cells
Resuspend IDT primers with H 2 O to 100 µM E.g. 20 nmol of primer (marked on tube label) - Add 200 µL H 2 O
Dilute primer to 10 µM in a new microcentrifuge tube E.g. 20 µL + 180 µL H 2 O
Store at -20°C
Prepare Master Mix – Number of reactions + 1 (as extra) Master Mix using BioMix Red - for one 20 µL reaction %s %s Master Mix using BioMix Red - for one 20 µL reaction %s %s
For each PCR tube: 1 µL DNA sample + 19 µL Master Mix
Bio-Rad Thermal Cycler – Select/Edit Protocol PCR Cycle %s %s
Transfer cells to labelled PCR tubes Vortex for 15 secs
Incubate at 65°C for 6 mins Vortex for 15 secs
Incubate at 98°C for 2 mins
Store at -20°C
Make 1x TAE buffer Add 36 mL 50X TAE Buffer Add diH 2 O up to 1800 mL
Gel preparation on Bio-Rad Sub-Cell GT Electrophoresis Cell system
Volume: Big tray: ~ 300 mL Small tray: ~ 150 mL
Gel percentage: 1.5-2% E.g. For 2% gel: 2 g agarose + 100 mL 1X TAE buffer
Heat in microwave until completely dissolve
Add SYBR™ Safe DNA Gel Stain E.g. 15 µL for 150 mL of gel
Pour onto the tray Note : Remove big bubbles
Put in the comb (15/20 well)
Let it cool until solidify
Make sure the gel is solidified completely
Carefully remove comb from gel
Put tray into Bio-Rad Sub-Cell GT Cell Note : Make sure the wells are placed near the end of the negative (black) terminal
Add 1X TAE buffer to the Sub-Cell GT Cell if needed Note : Make sure the gel is submerged in TAE buffer completely

Carefully load DNA ladder & PCR products Notes : - Submerge pipette tips into the well before dispensing PCR product - Prevent touching the wall of wells, which might break the gel - Recommend dispensing liquid by pressing to the first stop only to prevent creating air bubbles, which could lead to loss of PCR product
Set 100-140V on the Bio-Rad Power Supply Notes : Voltage depends on gel size Make sure the gel is connected to the power supply properly - Black to Black; Red to Red
START
Position the gel in LI-COR Odyssey M Imager

Open LI-COR Acquisition Software Select: - Scan - Username: ________ Imager: Odyssey M --> Connect - Gel --> Connect - Draw Scan Area --> Next - 488 SYBR Safe --> Save - Focus offset (mm): 2.00 --> Scan
Wait for scan to finish
Export image to desired destination
Note : Remember to clean the imager glass with EtOH and Kimwipe before and after each use
For each PCR tube: 2.5 µL DNA sample + 47 µL Master Mix
Prepare Master Mix – Number of reactions + 1 (as extra) Master Mix using BioMix Red – for one 50 µL reaction %s %s Master Mix using Q5 – for one 50 µL reaction %s %s
Bio-Rad Thermal Cycler – Select/Edit Protocol %s %s
Run gel electrophoresis as instructed above
Excise the desired gel band under UV light
Transfer the gel slice into a 1.5 mL tube
Add 0.6 mL Qiagen Buffer QG
Incubate at 50°C until gel has completely dissolved Note : Mix the tube every 1-2 mins to help dissolve the gel
Add 100 µL 100% isopropanol & mix by inverting
Transfer sample to a MinElute spin column (stored at 4°C)
Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 1 min & discard the filtrate Put back the spin column to the same collection tube
Repeat previous two steps until all sample has passed through the column
Add 650 µL Buffer PE to spin solumn
Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 1 min & discard the filtrate Put back the spin column to the same collection tube
Centrifuge at 13000 rpm for 1 min & discard the filtrate+collection tube Place the column in a new 1.5 mL tube
Add 35-50 µL Buffer EB Note : Make sure it is added to the center of the membrane
Incubate at 42°C for 3 mins
Centrifuge at 13000 rpm for 1 min
Repeat previous three steps to increase product yield Note : Reload with the purified DNA product instead of adding new Buffer EB
Quick-Load‱ Purple 1 kb Plus DNA Ladder
Run a 50 µL reaction instead of 20 µL
creator: Katie Jing Kay Lam
